== Notes for [[Item:Q83029|Q83029]] ==

# He was ''Qurra-ul-Kutub ul-Awwala'', i.e the most learned of all the Prophet's books.
# He was so learned and bestowed by ''Allah-e-Zuljalaal'' that he used to prophesize the advent of ''Rasoolullah Salawaatullahi alaihi'' much before his actual birth.

'''Notes by Mulla Saadullah Husami (4th September 2012)'''

Source: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Waraqah_ibn_Nawfal

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
